output-exprs.el: eventHistory:/*Event history*/ #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb"( #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/4a99e364-d147-44c1-8f9e-3368886ea29c": pv!eventId, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/b8a5f0fc-fd84-4032-9a72-92964a957d9c": 2, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/0f50d3b6-39a2-48fb-81e1-64f1962c9611": pp!initiator, #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/293bc4ec-ec50-4019-bba7-81ccaaff7d5b": #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:25bb5cef-4727-448a-a997-b990b8f80536" & " " & #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"(items: ac!attachment[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:17ccedd3-4c03-4664-8a75-fd71ae87f3ce/02925b99-1527-48bb-9fc8-406df81b2170"],expression: fv!item & if(fv!isLast,"",", ")), #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:19d38ef9-1b48-4045-ad3a-9bd7be992dcb/7f3aa1ca-cc5b-4d8f-ba65-5a7d59705c49": now() )
